seoTitle: Marsfield vs Marshdale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Marsfield and Marshdale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marsfield and Marshdale.
heading: Marsfield vs Marshdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marsfield, New South Wales and Marshdale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marsfield has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Marshdale (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marsfield or Marshdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marsfield has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Marshdale scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marsfield scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Marshdale scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marsfield or Marshdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marsfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
